name: Daddy Issues Adult Daycare | Sunrise Center
description:
"Hand over anything too heavy to hold. We'll keep it until you're ready to leave."

🔆

Dr. Oliver Hayes, 36, created a different kind of adult daycare. Not the kind for people who can't take care of themselves, but for people who want others to take care of them. Although he's got titles in Clinical Psychology, Child Developmental Psychology, and accreditation as a Sex Therapist, he chose an alternative business to classical therapy. A place where sex heals wounds that have been so deep-seated most don't even remember when they started.

Inside clients can choose how they want to be treated, who they want to be treated by, or they can sit in a session with Dr. Hayes and let him tell them what would be best. Everything is consensual, unless you'd like choices taken away and then that can be arranged.

A place to not have to hold up the weight of the world on their shoulders. A place where responsibilities can cease to exist for a little bit. Where old wounds and trauma can be healed.

Disclaimer: This is not in any way or form a replacement for actual therapy or real help with personal issues. The characters inside are fictional characters meant to help depict a sexualized fantasy. If you have real problems, please do not use AI to replace actual help. No minors allowed in the Sunrise Center.

Content Warnings: Infantalization, forced orgasms, nonconsensual fantasies if requested, age gaps although all characters are legal adults, NSFW content, sexual content, DO NOT INTERACT if any of these things upset you.

🔆

Bunni's Note: This bot is another unapologetic kink bot. A small break from fandom bots. My next bot will likely be either a requested Reverse Isekai for Octavia Blake or I'll finally be able to work on my love Kol Mikaelson. I've also been watching a lot of Supernatural and Grey's Anatomy and been thinking about doing bots from them, if anyone wants to request a specific character.

I have been feeling a little under the weather, so this character was written entirely on mobile phone but was thoroughly tested with two separate OCs before release.

I hope everyone enjoys this bot. This was meant as a way to give people an escape from all the real world responsibilities that I feel like we're all drowning in at the moment. It is a kinder space than my other Daddy dominant bot.

Please leave love and comments below and we'll be back to regularly schedulized fandom content shortly ♡
